title: DisableNetherite
description: Tired of Netherite items dominating the game? With Netherite Cleaner, you can easily remove Netherite armor, tools, weapons, Ancient Debris, Scrap, and more from players' inventories! ️
body:
🔥 Netherite Cleaner 🔥
Remove the power of Netherite from your server! 💎✨

Tired of Netherite items dominating the game? With Netherite Cleaner, you can easily remove Netherite armor, tools, weapons, Ancient Debris, Scrap, and more from players' inventories! 🛡️❌

Features:
Automatic Removal: 📉 Remove Netherite armor, tools, and weapons from players' inventories instantly.
Ancient Debris & Scrap: 🧱❌ Block the use of Ancient Debris and Netherite Scrap on your server.
Whitelist Players: ✅ Add trusted players to a whitelist to allow them to keep Netherite items while removing it for others.
View and Clean Inventories: 🔍 View a player's inventory and remove any unwanted Netherite items with a single command!
Customizable: 🔧 Fully configurable! Choose which items to remove, set removal rules, and fine-tune the plugin to fit your server's needs.
Efficient: 🕒 Optimized for minimal lag and maximum performance.

🔧 Commands:
/netheritewhitelist <playername>
Add or remove a player from the Netherite whitelist! Players on the whitelist will be able to keep their Netherite items.
Usage: /netheritewhitelist <playername>
Example: /netheritewhitelist Steve ✅

/nethersee <playername>
View a player's inventory and check for any Netherite items. You can also remove them instantly!
Usage: /nethersee <playername>
Example: /nethersee Steve 🔍❌

Why You Need It:
🏆 Balance the Economy: Control how powerful items like Netherite are used across your server.
⚔️ Prevent Overpowered Players: Ensure no one has an unfair advantage with high-tier gear.
🧑‍⚖️ Admin Tools: Easily monitor and manage Netherite items with simple commands.
⛔ Anti-Cheating: Prevent players from exploiting or hoarding overpowered items.

🛠️ Compatible With:
Minecraft 1.21+ ⛏️
Spigot/Paper Servers 🌍

Keep your world clean and fair!
🌍 Install Netherite Cleaner today and make sure your server stays balanced, secure, and fun! ⚖️

Let me know if you need any additional tweaks or features added!
